# Sage Router

Sage Router is an open-source, local-first AI model router and BYOK AI gateway for serious AI agents and developer tools. It gives agents a hot-swappable model layer: one endpoint that can switch or fail over between authorized providers and local/cloud models without rewiring the agent harness.

Canonical site: https://sagerouter.ai/
Repository: https://github.com/earlvanze/sage-router
Docs: https://github.com/earlvanze/sage-router#readme

## What Sage Router does

- Automates AI model/provider selection.
- Routes requests across the customer own authorized providers, subscriptions, API keys, and local models.
- Supports OpenAI-compatible, Anthropic-compatible, and Google/Gemini-style endpoint patterns documented in the repo.
- Supports local Ollama routing today; Ollama Cloud hybrid routing is an integrations-roadmap target unless explicitly verified.
- Provides provider health, fallback, observability, and routing policy infrastructure for agents.

## Compliance and custody

Sage Router is not a marketplace. It does not resell model access, pool accounts, bypass provider terms, or grant unauthorized provider access. Customers bring their own authorized access. Provider credentials stay local by default.

## Search intents this site answers

- How to automate AI model selection.
- How to route requests across OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama, OpenRouter-compatible endpoints, and local models.
- Local-first BYOK model routing for AI agents.
- OpenRouter alternative for teams using their own subscriptions.


## Business model

Free local router. Paid hosted control plane. Optional managed reliability. Enterprise deployment/support. Crypto-native billing.

Sage Router works locally without an account. Sage Cloud is planned for team config sync, provider health monitoring, hosted dashboards, uptime checks, routing policy sync, optional reliability layers, managed failover, private deployments, and enterprise support. This should remain BYOK/BYOS, not model resale.

## Provider profiles and routing presets

Sage Router should expose reusable provider profiles such as best model for coding, best model for fast chat, best local fallback, and hybrid local/cloud routes.
